creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 213261
svn diff to correct LICENSE for claws-mail-themes

The attached svn diff fixes LICENSE in this port.

EXPLANATION
I read the output of a different port I was also
working on at the same time, and used the wrong
LICENSE stanza in this port.

The attached svn diff *corrects* that, and also
silences pkg-fallout@ which alerted me to this
oversight.

CHANGES
Makefile:
LICENSE
LICENSE_NAME
LICENSE_TEXT
LICENSE_PERMS

SUMMARY
There are ~30 different themes within this port, and
they all define their own license, if any. The changes
noted above deal with this condition.

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
